text:
今回の特訓も、想像以上の結果を
得ることができた。

浮上施設ならではの
想定しにくいアクシデントにも
対処できた。

今後も互いに精進していきたい。
いずれまた、共に特

This training was more rewarding than I had
imagined it could be.

We were readily able to handle unpredictable
mishaps that occur only in the Floating
Facility.

I would like to continue honing our skills
together. I hope you'll train with me again
sometime.
